svg.title: MOLECULES smooth animated chemical-stream banner
svg.desc: MOLECULES is centered over twelve separated, infinitely scrolling rows of chemically valid polymer repeat-unit formulae. The rows move continuously in alternating directions and slowly crossfade between valid chains.
svg.metadata: Motion uses continuous CSS transforms rather than animated text-path offsets. Each displayed chain repeats a neutral, closed-shell repeat unit. All repeat-unit SMILES were sanitized with RDKit 2025.09.4 and have exactly two attachment atoms. polyoxymethylene: CHâ‚‚-O- | *CO* polyethylene oxide: CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-O- | *CCO* polyacetylene: CH=CH- | *C=C* poly(p-phenylene vinylene): p-Câ‚†Hâ‚„-CH=CH- | *c1ccc(C=C*)cc1 polyglycine: NH-CHâ‚‚-C(=O)- | *NCC(=O)* polyalanine: NH-CH(CHâ‚ƒ)-C(=O)- | *NC(C)C(=O)* poly(ethylene terephthalate): O-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-O-C(=O)-p-Câ‚†Hâ‚„-C(=O)- | *OCCOC(=O)c1ccc(C(=O)*)cc1 bisphenol A polycarbonate: O-p-Câ‚†Hâ‚„-C(CHâ‚ƒ)â‚‚-p-Câ‚†Hâ‚„-O-C(=O)- | *Oc1ccc(C(C)(C)c2ccc(OC(=O)*)cc2)cc1 polybutadiene (1,4-addition): CHâ‚‚-CH=CH-CHâ‚‚- | *CC=CC* polyisoprene (1,4-addition): CHâ‚‚-C(CHâ‚ƒ)=CH-CHâ‚‚- | *CC(C)=CC* polyacrylonitrile: CHâ‚‚-CH(Câ‰¡N)- | *CC(C#N)* poly(methyl methacrylate): CHâ‚‚-C(CHâ‚ƒ)(C(=O)-O-CHâ‚ƒ)- | *CC(C)(C(=O)OC)* nylon 6: NH-(CHâ‚‚)â‚…-C(=O)- | *NCCCCCC(=O)* nylon 6,6: NH-(CHâ‚‚)â‚†-NH-C(=O)-(CHâ‚‚)â‚„-C(=O)- | *NCCCCCCNC(=O)CCCCC(=O)* polydimethylsiloxane: Si(CHâ‚ƒ)â‚‚-O- | *[Si](C)(C)O* poly(ethylene sulfide): CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-S- | *CCS* poly(vinyl alcohol): CHâ‚‚-CH(OH)- | *CC(O)* poly(vinyl acetate): CHâ‚‚-CH(O-C(=O)-CHâ‚ƒ)- | *CC(OC(=O)C)* polystyrene: CHâ‚‚-CH(Câ‚†Hâ‚…)- | *CC(c1ccccc1)* poly(p-phenylene ethynylene): p-Câ‚†Hâ‚„-Câ‰¡C- | *c1ccc(C#C*)cc1 segmented polyurethane model: O-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-O-C(=O)-NH-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-NH-C(=O)- | *OCCOC(=O)NCCNC(=O)* polyurea model: NH-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-NH-C(=O)- | *NCCNC(=O)* polyphosphoester model: O-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-O-P(=O)(OCHâ‚ƒ)- | *OCCOP(=O)(OC)* polyboronate model: O-CHâ‚‚-CHâ‚‚-O-B(OH)- | *OCCOB(O)*
